title: hierochloe pluriflora var. intermedia
intro: Hierochloe pluriflora var. intermedia, also known as Vanilla grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hierochloe pluriflora var. intermedia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
